narrative:
Warren City has 21,927 registered voters, with 59.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 6.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 34.9%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 28.9 percentage points.
